top_patterns.description: Opens with personal reflection or gratitude, shares a story or insight, ends with a question or invitation.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Most recent captions, especially in era_c
example_quotes: What I thought would be a quick trip to pick up son, Summit, from camp turned into something much more meaningful.
Sometimes, the smallest gesture means the most.

top_patterns.description: Shares a lesson or insight, then directs to a link or encourages engagement.
example_quotes: Check out Lesson 6 of Next Steps to see how this foundational principle can help you, your business and everyone around you thrive.
Read The Way of Integrity by @themarthabeck to understand why living with integrity is the key to happiness.

top_patterns.description: Expresses gratitude for people or experiences, often with a personal anecdote.
example_quotes: I’m so grateful to Daniella for helping me grow as a photographer.
Thanks to God, my family, friends and many different healing modalities, I got the help I needed.

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Express appreciation, share a personal insight, invite engagement
example_quotes: I am so grateful for his friendship and even more for the quiet powerful ripples he creates for Mother Earth every single day.
This year I let AI give me my playa name for Burning Man. After everything I’ve been through these past few years, it came back with one word: Risen.

archetypal_structures.formula: Share a story or insight + ask a question
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Engage audience through storytelling and reflection
example_quotes: When you’re face to face with a creature like this, there’s no room for distraction. No thoughts about yesterday, no worries about tomorrow. Just breath. Just presence. Just awe.
What helps you remember the storm will pass?

closers: Check out the link in bio.
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often 10-20 words, with occasional longer reflections.
language_habits.line_break_style: Mostly continuous, with occasional line breaks for emphasis or separation of ideas.

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Creates intimacy and authenticity, invites comment-ready engagement.
example_quotes: Feeling nothing but gratitude for the support along the way.
I realized it wasn’t the picture itself that mattered. It was the feeling.

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Encourages audience participation, comment, or sharing.
example_quotes: What helps you remember the storm will pass?
Check in on your people. It could change their day or even save their life.

anti_patterns: Generic motivational quotes without personal touch

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake’s current voice is highly personal, reflective, and emotionally open, with frequent calls to action and engagement prompts.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift from more formal, corporate tone to intimate, story-driven, and vulnerability-sharing style.
